moments.title: Commonwealth Games Glasgow 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games officially begin in Glasgow, Scotland, bringing together athletes from across the Commonwealth for 10 days of competition.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Buzz
angles.copy: Glasgow is buzzing! The Commonwealth Games 2026 officially open tomorrow, with the opening ceremony set to dazzle. Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: UK-wide excitement
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are here! Starting tomorrow in Glasgow, get ready for incredible sporting moments. What's your favourite event?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns to Suffolk
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival brings its diverse mix of music, comedy, arts, and culture to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, 2026.

angles.name: Suffolk Local Angle
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is back! Henham Park is about to come alive with four days of incredible music and arts. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Festival season is in full swing! Latitude kicks off tomorrow – get ready for a weekend of music, laughs, and good times in Suffolk.

moments.title: Truck Festival Takes Over Oxfordshire
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, known for its indie and alternative lineup, runs from July 23-26, 2026, at Hill Farm in Steventon, Oxfordshire.

angles.name: Indie Festival Alert
angles.copy: Truck Festival is GO! If you're heading to Hill Farm this weekend for some top indie and alternative acts, have an amazing time!

angles.name: Rock & Roll Weekend
angles.copy: Ready for a weekend of live music? Truck Festival starts tomorrow in Oxfordshire, bringing some of the best rock and indie bands to the stage.

moments.title: WOMAD Festival Celebrates World Music
moments.blurb: The World of Music, Arts and Dance (WOMAD) Festival takes place from July 23-26, 2026, offering a global celebration of culture and sound.

angles.name: Global Rhythms
angles.copy: Get ready for a world of sound! WOMAD Festival kicks off tomorrow, bringing incredible music, arts, and dance from across the globe. Who's going?

angles.name: Cultural Festival
angles.copy: Four days of world music and culture begin tomorrow with WOMAD! Immerse yourself in the sounds and sights of this unique festival.

moments.title: Steelhouse Festival Rocks Wales
moments.blurb: The Steelhouse Festival, Wales's premier rock event, takes place from July 24-26, 2026, high up on the mountain in Ebbw Vale, Gwent.

angles.name: Welsh Rockers Unite
angles.copy: Calling all rock fans in Wales! Steelhouse Festival kicks off on Friday for a weekend of heavy riffs and mountain views. Who's making the pilgrimage?

angles.name: Local Welsh Gig
angles.copy: It's almost time to rock! Steelhouse Festival is back this weekend in Ebbw Vale, bringing a massive lineup to the Welsh mountains. Don't miss out!

moments.title: GuilFest Returns with Star-Studded Lineup
moments.blurb: GuilFest makes its comeback at Stoke Park, Surrey, on July 25-26, 2026, featuring Sophie Ellis-Bextor, Rudimental (DJ set), ABC, and more.

angles.name: Festival Comeback
angles.copy: GuilFest is back this weekend! Sophie Ellis-Bextor, Rudimental, ABC and more are taking over Stoke Park. Who's excited for the return of this classic festival?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Looking for weekend plans? GuilFest returns Saturday and Sunday with a brilliant lineup mixing pop, dance, and classic hits. Grab your tickets!

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger! Still strutting, still singing, still The Rolling Stones. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: 83 years young! Celebrating the one and only Mick Jagger today. A true pioneer who defined generations of rock and roll. What's your favourite era of The Stones?

moments.title: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival Begins
moments.blurb: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival, Scotland's family-friendly music and arts festival, kicks off in the Scottish Highlands from July 30 to August 1, 2026, with headliners James and The Human League.

angles.name: Scottish Festival Buzz
angles.copy: The Highlands are calling! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival begins on Thursday with James, The Human League and more. Who's packing their wellies for Bella?

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Get ready for three days of music, arts, and family fun! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival starts this week in Scotland. What's your top tip for festivals with kids?

moments.title: Y-Not Festival Kicks Off in Derbyshire
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival returns to Pikehall, Derbyshire, from July 30 to August 2, 2026, featuring The Libertines, Reytons, Two Door Cinema Club, and The Streets.

angles.name: Indie Anthems
angles.copy: Y-Not Festival is almost here! The Libertines, The Streets & more are heading to Derbyshire this week. Get ready for a huge weekend of live music!

angles.name: Derbyshire Festival
angles.copy: Dust off your festival gear! Y-Not Festival kicks off on Thursday in the Peak District. Who's joining The Libertines for a weekend of tunes?

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset Opens Its Gates
moments.blurb: Camp Bestival Dorset, the family-friendly festival, returns to Lulworth Castle from July 30 to August 2, 2026, promising a weekend of music, arts, and activities.

angles.name: Family Fun Festival
angles.copy: Summer holidays mean Camp Bestival! Dorset's favourite family festival starts this Thursday at Lulworth Castle. Who's ready for a magical weekend?

angles.name: Dorset Delights
angles.copy: Sun's out, festivals are on! Camp Bestival Dorset kicks off this week – perfect for a family adventure filled with music and entertainment.

moments.title: Kate Bush's 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: The influential English singer-songwriter Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on July 30, 2026.

angles.name: Music Visionary
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the incredible Kate Bush! A true visionary who changed music forever. What's your all-time favourite Kate Bush song?

angles.name: Iconic Artist
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique talent of Kate Bush on her 68th birthday! Her artistry continues to inspire. Which of her albums do you love most?

moments.title: Strictly Come Dancing 2026 Launch Show Ticket Ballot Closes Soon
moments.blurb: The ballot for free tickets to the pre-recorded launch show of Strictly Come Dancing 2026, featuring new hosts Emma Willis, Johannes Radebe, and Josh Widdicombe, closes on August 4, 2026.

angles.name: Grab Strictly Tickets
angles.copy: Want to be in the audience for the Strictly Come Dancing 2026 launch show? The ticket ballot closes on August 4th! Don't miss your chance to see the new hosts.

angles.name: New Strictly Era
angles.copy: A new era for Strictly! Emma Willis, Johannes Radebe & Josh Widdicombe are taking over. Apply for your chance to be at the launch show recording – ballot closes August 4th!
